emr.ebsconfiguration.ebsblockdeviceconfi: Configuration of requested EBS block device associated with the instance group with count of volumes that are associated to every instance.

emr.ebsconfiguration.ebsblockdeviceconfi.Description: EBS volume specifications such as volume type, IOPS, size (GiB) and throughput (MiB/s) that are requested for the EBS volume attached to an Amazon EC2 instance in the cluster.
Number of EBS volumes with a specific volume configuration that are associated with every instance in the instance group
